summary: PR #2415 advances ftdrawcommon matching work by changing ftdrawcommon.c, marking melee/ft/ftdrawcommon.c as Matching in configure.py, and adjusting symbol metadata for local data/string/float/double entries. The main code tactic is extracting a static inline helper equivalent to ftDrawCommon_8008051C's matrix setup and using it at call sites in ftDrawCommon_800805C8 and ftDrawCommon_80080C28 while reshaping locals, stack padding, and matrix/vector temporaries.

key_files.role: Primary decomp source change; adds ftDrawCommon_8008051C_inline and changes call sites/local layout in ftDrawCommon_800805C8 and ftDrawCommon_80080C28.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/ft/ftdrawcommon.c hunk adds static inline MtxPtr ftDrawCommon_8008051C_inline
raw_diff: ftDrawCommon_800805C8 changes locals, PAD_STACK, and replaces ftDrawCommon_8008051C call with ftDrawCommon_8008051C_inline
raw_diff: ftDrawCommon_80080C28 adds sp18/sp54/v locals and uses ftDrawCommon_8008051C_inline

key_files.role: Build configuration change; promotes melee/ft/ftdrawcommon.c from NonMatching to Matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py changes Object(NonMatching, "melee/ft/ftdrawcommon.c") to Object(Matching, "melee/ft/ftdrawcommon.c")

key_files.role: Symbol metadata update; renames several data/sdata/sdata2 entries to local @ labels and changes ftDrawCommon_804D8370 size from 0x8 to 0x4.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: config/GALE01/symbols.txt changes ftDrawCommon_803C0EB0 to @463
raw_diff: config/GALE01/symbols.txt changes ftDrawCommon_804D3A94/@3A9C strings to @461/@462
raw_diff: config/GALE01/symbols.txt changes ftDrawCommon_804D8370 size 0x8 to 0x4
raw_diff: config/GALE01/symbols.txt changes multiple it_* global float/double/string symbols to local @ labels

what_changed.text: Added a static inline helper, ftDrawCommon_8008051C_inline, that zeros two Vec3s, calls ftLib_80087074, reads HSD_CObjGetCurrent()->view_mtx, initializes a matrix, applies mtx_thing_2, concatenates matrices, and returns either the output matrix or NULL.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added ftDrawCommon_8008051C_inline body in src/melee/ft/ftdrawcommon.c

what_changed.text: Changed ftDrawCommon_800805C8 local declarations and stack layout, including adding matrix/vector locals, a 12-byte pad array, and PAD_STACK(12), then replaced a call to ftDrawCommon_8008051C with the new inline helper.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftDrawCommon_800805C8 adds Mtx sp78, Mtx sp18, Vec3 sp54, Vec3 v, u8 _pad[12], PAD_STACK(12)
raw_diff: ftDrawCommon_800805C8 replaces mtx = ftDrawCommon_8008051C(gobj, sp78) with ftDrawCommon_8008051C_inline(...)

what_changed.text: Changed ftDrawCommon_80080C28 local declarations and replaced its ftDrawCommon_8008051C call with the same inline helper.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftDrawCommon_80080C28 adds Mtx sp18, Vec3 sp54, Vec3 v
raw_diff: ftDrawCommon_80080C28 replaces phi_r28 = ftDrawCommon_8008051C(gobj, sp70) with ftDrawCommon_8008051C_inline(...)

what_changed.text: Marked ftdrawcommon.c as Matching in configure.py.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py MatchingFor object list changes melee/ft/ftdrawcommon.c from NonMatching to Matching

what_changed.text: Adjusted symbol metadata for several local strings/floats/doubles, including converting some named global it_* and ftDrawCommon_* symbols to local @ labels and narrowing ftDrawCommon_804D8370 from size 0x8 to 0x4.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: config/GALE01/symbols.txt hunks for .data, .sdata, and .sdata2 symbol changes

smart_moves.text: The author avoided relying only on a direct function call in a large hard-to-permute function by extracting the relevant matrix setup into a static inline helper and using it at multiple call sites.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: author says ftDrawCommon_800805C8 is one tiny regswap away and huge, so the permuter struggles
raw_diff: ftDrawCommon_8008051C_inline added and used in ftDrawCommon_800805C8 and ftDrawCommon_80080C28

smart_moves.text: The PR paired source-level matching work with build configuration promotion to Matching and symbol metadata cleanup, indicating the object-level status was part of the change scope.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py promotes ftdrawcommon.c to Matching
raw_diff: config/GALE01/symbols.txt metadata updates

decomp_lessons.lesson: For very large functions where a permuter struggles with a small register-allocation issue, a narrow static inline helper can sometimes expose the intended codegen shape at call sites without duplicating a full function body.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: "one tiny regswap away" and "huge function, so the permuter really struggles"
raw_diff: added ftDrawCommon_8008051C_inline and used it in ftDrawCommon_800805C8

decomp_lessons.lesson: When inlining a helper for matching, the local stack shape may need to include the helper's temporaries at the caller, such as extra Mtx and Vec3 locals plus explicit padding.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftDrawCommon_800805C8 adds Mtx sp18/sp78, Vec3 sp54/v, u8 _pad[12], and PAD_STACK(12)
raw_diff: ftDrawCommon_80080C28 adds Mtx sp18 and Vec3 sp54/v before calling inline helper

naming_conventions.text: The new inline helper keeps the address-style base name ftDrawCommon_8008051C and appends _inline rather than inventing a semantic name.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static inline MtxPtr ftDrawCommon_8008051C_inline(...)

naming_conventions.text: Several symbols in symbols.txt were changed from semantic/address-style global names to local compiler-style @ labels, suggesting the PR treated those data entries as local literals or constants rather than canonical named globals.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftDrawCommon_803C0EB0 -> @463
raw_diff: it_803F67A8 -> @239

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Extracted and reused a static inline form of ftDrawCommon_8008051C to influence call-site codegen in ftDrawCommon_800805C8 and ftDrawCommon_80080C28.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added ftDrawCommon_8008051C_inline
raw_diff: ftDrawCommon_800805C8 and ftDrawCommon_80080C28 call ftDrawCommon_8008051C_inline

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Adjusted declaration order and local lifetimes for MWCC stack/register behavior, including moving int i earlier and hoisting Mtx sp78 out of an inner block.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftDrawCommon_800805C8 adds int i near GXColor locals and removes prior int i location
raw_diff: ftDrawCommon_800805C8 moves Mtx sp78 from inside conditional block to function-scope local declarations

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used explicit padding alongside stack local reshaping.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftDrawCommon_800805C8 adds u8 _pad[12] and changes PAD_STACK(0x18) to PAD_STACK(12)
raw_diff: ftDrawCommon_80080C28 keeps PAD_STACK(4)

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Updated symbol scope/name/size metadata for data sections as part of matching work.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: config/GALE01/symbols.txt converts multiple global symbols to local @ labels
raw_diff: ftDrawCommon_804D8370 size changes from 0x8 to 0x4

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use a narrow static inline helper when a huge function is blocked by a tiny regswap
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2415, the author stated ftDrawCommon_800805C8 was one tiny regswap away but too large for the permuter to handle well. The diff adds ftDrawCommon_8008051C_inline and uses it at ftdrawcommon call sites while reshaping locals and stack padding. This is evidence that localized inline extraction can be a useful tactic for large-function codegen issues, provided the result is verified separately.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: one tiny regswap away; huge function; permuter struggles
raw_diff: ftDrawCommon_8008051C_inline added and called from ftDrawCommon_800805C8

source_update_candidates.title: Document static inline extraction as an evidence-requiring matching tactic
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding explicit guidance that static inline helper extraction can be a legitimate matching tactic for large functions with small register/codegen blockers, but it should be scoped narrowly and backed by objdiff/build evidence because it changes local stack/register behavior.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: ftDrawCommon_800805C8 is one tiny regswap away and the permuter struggles
raw_diff: new static inline helper used to replace calls in ftdrawcommon.c
decomp_standards: matching-tactics-need-evidence
source_update_candidates.reason: The loaded standards discuss manual inline expansion and tactic evidence broadly; this PR provides a concrete pattern for curator review, but the slice lacks verifier logs so it should not be promoted automatically.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that ftDrawCommon_800805C8 fully matched from the PR body alone; the body says it is one regswap away, while configure.py marks the object Matching, and no objdiff/checkdiff output is loaded.
Do not infer reviewer approval rationale or requested changes; there are no review or issue comments in the slice.
Do not generalize the symbol renames into a rule that named globals should become @ labels; this PR only shows specific metadata changes without explanatory rationale.
